mapper.select:
SELECT es.`id`, es.`platform`, es.`speed`, es.`time`, es.`address`, es.`macAddress`, es.`macAddress5G`, es.`sceneId`, es.`areaId`, es.`apId`, es.`speedometer`, scene.`name` sceneName, area.`name` areaName, ap.`name` apName FROM experiencespeed es LEFT JOIN scene ON es.`sceneId`=scene.`id` LEFT JOIN area ON es.`areaId`=area.`id` LEFT JOIN ap on es.`apId`=ap.`id` where 1=1 and es.`speedometer` like CONCAT('%',#{speedometer},'%') and es.time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{startTime},'%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') and es.time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{endTime},'%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND es.`sceneId` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sceneId},'%')
AND es.`areaId` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{areaId},'%')
AND es.`apId` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{apId},'%')
ORDER BY es.`time` DESC

SELECT es.`id`, es.`platform`, es.`speed`, es.`time`, es.`address`, es.`macAddress`, es.`macAddress5G`, es.`sceneId`, es.`areaId`, es.`apId`, es.`speedometer`, scene.`name` sceneName, area.`name` areaName, ap.`name` apName FROM experiencespeed es LEFT JOIN scene ON es.`sceneId`=scene.`id` LEFT JOIN area ON es.`areaId`=area.`id` LEFT JOIN ap on es.`apId`=ap.`id` where es.id=#{id}
